test_plan.strategy: Unit tests for all collector readers and alert rules; file-based static analysis for frontend components. No browser automation — components are read-only display with no user interaction beyond rendering.
test_plan.coverage_goal: All 5 FRs covered with h/f/e test cases; all 3 NFRs covered; zero test gaps on null/missing input paths.

test_cases.title: readBugsSummary returns correct counts from valid BUGS.json
preconditions: BUGS.json exists at <artifactsDir>/BUGS.json with 3 open bugs: 1 critical, 1 high, 1 medium
test_cases.expected_result: Returns { open:3, fixed:0, verified:0, closed:0, critical:1, high:1, medium:1, low:0, openIds:['BG-001','BG-002','BG-003'] }
test_cases.given: a project with a valid BUGS.json containing 3 open bugs of mixed severity
test_cases.when: readBugsSummary is called with that project directory
test_cases.then: returns correct counts for each status and severity bucket

test_cases.title: readBugsSummary returns null for absent BUGS.json
preconditions: No BUGS.json exists in the project directory
test_cases.given: a project directory with no BUGS.json file
test_cases.then: returns null and does not throw

test_cases.title: readBugsSummary returns null for malformed BUGS.json
preconditions: BUGS.json exists but contains invalid JSON
test_cases.given: a BUGS.json file with malformed JSON content
test_cases.then: returns null — parse error is caught internally

test_cases.title: evaluateAlerts generates blocking alert for open critical bug
preconditions: project has bugsSummary with open:2, critical:1, high:1
steps: call evaluateAlerts with project data containing that bugsSummary
test_cases.expected_result: Returns array containing exactly one alert with type='open-bugs', severity='blocking', message='Open bugs: 1 critical, 1 high'
test_cases.given: a project with bugsSummary.open=2, critical=1, high=1
test_cases.then: one blocking alert with correct message is returned

test_cases.title: evaluateAlerts generates warning alert for open medium/low bugs only
preconditions: project has bugsSummary with open:2, critical:0, high:0, medium:1, low:1
test_cases.expected_result: Returns array containing exactly one alert with type='open-bugs', severity='warning', message='Open bugs: 1 medium, 1 low'
test_cases.given: a project with only medium/low open bugs
test_cases.then: one warning alert with correct message is returned

test_cases.title: evaluateAlerts generates no bug alert when bugsSummary is null
test_cases.expected_result: No alert with type='open-bugs' in the returned array
test_cases.given: a project with null bugsSummary (no BUGS.json)

test_cases.title: readAitriState returns lastSession fields from .aitri
preconditions: .aitri contains lastSession: { at, agent: 'claude', event: 'complete requirements', files_touched: ['src/auth.js'] }
test_cases.expected_result: Returns aitriState.lastSession with at, agent='claude', event='complete requirements', files_touched=['src/auth.js']
test_cases.given: a .aitri file with a valid lastSession object
test_cases.then: lastSession fields are preserved exactly as stored

test_cases.title: readAitriState returns lastSession: null when field absent
preconditions: .aitri file does not contain a lastSession field (pre-v0.1.70 project)
test_cases.given: a .aitri file with no lastSession field
test_cases.then: lastSession is null and all other fields are unaffected

test_cases.title: readAitriState normalizes lastSession.files_touched absent to null
preconditions: .aitri has lastSession with at, agent, event but no files_touched field
test_cases.given: a .aitri lastSession without the files_touched subfield

test_cases.title: ActivityTab renders lastSession row for project with session data
steps: verify LastSessionRow is imported and rendered
verify agent color map covers all known agents
test_cases.expected_result: ActivityTab.jsx imports LastSessionRow and renders it conditionally on lastSession non-null; LastSessionRow.jsx defines color map for claude/codex/gemini/opencode/cursor/unknown
test_cases.given: LastSessionRow and ActivityTab component files exist on disk
test_cases.then: structural requirements are met: import present, conditional rendering, full agent color map

test_cases.title: ActivityTab renders no lastSession row when lastSession is null
steps: verify it renders nothing when lastSession prop is null/absent
test_cases.expected_result: LastSessionRow returns null or empty fragment when no lastSession prop is passed
test_cases.given: LastSessionRow receives a null lastSession prop
test_cases.then: early return null guard is present

test_cases.title: LastSessionRow handles unknown agent with fallback color
steps: verify agent color map includes 'unknown' fallback
test_cases.expected_result: AGENT_COLORS map includes a default/unknown entry using --syn-comment color
test_cases.given: an agent string not in the color map

test_cases.title: BugBadge renders red badge for critical/high open bugs
steps: verify it renders blocking variant when critical>0 or high>0
read ProjectCard.jsx and verify BugBadge is imported and used
test_cases.expected_result: BugBadge.jsx renders a red (--syn-red) badge with open count when critical>0||high>0; ProjectCard.jsx imports BugBadge and passes bugsSummary prop
test_cases.given: BugBadge and ProjectCard source files exist
test_cases.then: blocking variant uses syn-red, ProjectCard wires bugsSummary

test_cases.title: BugBadge renders nothing when bugsSummary is null
test_cases.expected_result: BugBadge returns null when bugsSummary is null or bugsSummary.open === 0
test_cases.then: null guard prevents any badge from rendering

test_cases.title: collectOne includes bugsSummary in project data written to dashboard.json
preconditions: registered local project with BUGS.json containing 1 critical open bug
test_cases.expected_result: dashboard.json project entry contains bugsSummary.critical === 1 and bugsSummary.open === 1
test_cases.given: a local project with a valid BUGS.json
test_cases.when: collectOne runs and dashboard.json is written
test_cases.then: the project entry in dashboard.json includes the correct bugsSummary

test_cases.title: end-to-end: blocking bug alert appears in dashboard.json alerts array
preconditions: registered local project with BUGS.json containing 1 open critical bug
test_cases.expected_result: project.alerts contains one entry with type='open-bugs' and severity='blocking'
test_cases.given: a project with an open critical bug in BUGS.json
test_cases.then: dashboard.json project.alerts includes a blocking open-bugs alert

test_cases.title: BugBadge renders yellow badge for medium/low-only open bugs
steps: verify warning variant uses syn-yellow when critical===0 && high===0 && open>0
test_cases.expected_result: BugBadge uses --syn-yellow color class for warning variant
test_cases.given: bugsSummary with open>0 but critical=0 and high=0
